# 长代码行测试

下面是一段包含超长行的代码块，用于复现 PDF 中代码不换行的 bug：

```python
very_long_variable_name_that_exceeds_page_width = some_function_call(argument_one, argument_two, argument_three, argument_four, argument_five, argument_six, argument_seven)
```

```javascript
const anotherExtremelyLongLineOfCodeThatShouldWrapButCurrentlyDoesNotWrapInThePDFOutput = someFunction(paramOne, paramTwo, paramThree, paramFour, paramFive, paramSix);
```
